control_owner.authorization: LeaseAuthority plus ProtectedRefPolicy and IntegrationPublisher capability
control_owner.success_verdict: full-identity validation receipt plus IndependentRefReader commit-and-tree readback
control_owner.effects: bounded validator and outbox workers with reconciliation

fsm_projection.rule: The FSM owns lifecycle semantics. This loop is a conservative runner aggregate: it folds detailed readback branches into receipt-or-abandon control outcomes required by loop-contract/v1. RECEIPT_CONFIRMED is outcome-neutral aggregation and dispatches no runtime publication action: the FSM has already emitted FinalizePublishedAttempt only for REF_READ_NEW or invalidated authorization for REF_READ_OLD. A folded FAILED_PERMANENT means the automatic runner cannot continue; publication_committed and failure_class preserve whether the runtime Task is DONE or remains CONNECTING/NEEDS_REPAIR. It is not a second lifecycle SSOT.

loop_only_states.INIT: pre-admission envelope before the FSM's QUEUED initial state

event_map.CAS_REPORTED_STALE: ATTEMPT_RECORDED then authoritative readback; the publisher claim is not a verdict
event_map.REF_READ_OLD: RECEIPT_CONFIRMED with publication_outcome=not_landed; the FSM retains the VALIDATED reauthorization branch
event_map.REF_READ_OTHER: ABANDON with failure_class=unknown_effect_needs_repair; the FSM retains NEEDS_REPAIR
event_map.CANCEL: CANCEL before effect-critical states; otherwise translate to INTERRUPT_RECORDED(cancel)
event_map.TIMEOUT: TIMEOUT before effect-critical states; otherwise translate to INTERRUPT_RECORDED(timeout)
event_map.BUDGET_EXHAUSTED: BUDGET_EXHAUSTED before effect-critical states; otherwise translate to INTERRUPT_RECORDED(budget_exhausted)
event_map.RETRIES_EXHAUSTED: RETRIES_EXHAUSTED before publication; ABANDON the automatic runner after an unresolved publication effect, preserve the effect/repair checkpoint, and keep the runtime Task fail-stop

EnqueuePostPublishEffects.risk: push, cleanup, and telemetry after publication

transitions.evidence: immutable attempt identity and current fence
queue sequence and validator slot
base, task tip, candidate commit and tree hashes
typed Git or candidate-integrity failure
candidate or checkpoint integrity mismatch
full-identity green receipt
red receipt and bounded output hash
typed check launch or policy failure
full receipt identity, owner, fence-set digest, bail/coordinator epochs, authority snapshot, approval hash, CAS arguments, and effect id
stale owner, fence, bail epoch, base, or receipt
durable expected-old/new-SHA effect record
effect-correlated CAS arguments and bounded response hash
effect-correlated authoritative landed or not-landed runtime receipt and pending-interrupt snapshot; the aggregate emits no publication action
ref outcome cannot yet be classified
effect-correlated authoritative landed or not-landed runtime receipt and pending-interrupt snapshot; the aggregate emits no publication action
automatic reconciliation budget exhausted; effect identity, last authoritative ref observation, pending interrupts, and repair checkpoint remain durable
MERGED task, generation, released fence set, merge log, outbox intents, and empty pending-interrupt ledger
effect-correlated not-landed or unknown-effect runner failure; publication evidence and pending-interrupt ledger remain durable
MERGED task plus durable pending cancellation
MERGED task plus durable pending timeout
MERGED task plus durable pending budget exhaustion
candidate retry ledger
validation retry ledger

global_interrupts.deferred_behavior: record pending cancellation, reconcile and finalize any ref mutation, then report cancellation without undoing published history
block new effects, reconcile publication outcome, then honor timeout
block new effects, reconcile publication outcome, then honor budget exhaustion

budgets.soft_boundary: stop admitting new work at 80 percent of queue or wall budget and drain admitted attempts

no_progress.fingerprint: attempt state, base SHA, candidate tree SHA, receipt hash, observed ref, retry count, and error class
no_progress.gain_metric: a new durable state, new external receipt, or changed authoritative ref observation
no_progress.calibration: fixed protocol rule; identical fingerprints are not meaningful gain
no_progress.plateau_comparator: all attempts in the window repeat an identical fingerprint

retry.backoff: bounded exponential backoff with jitter; no 10 ms authoritative busy poll
retry.post_publication_unknown_outcome: ABANDON automatic reconciliation, preserve evidence, then FAILED_PERMANENT with failure_class=unknown_effect_needs_repair

effects.delivery_semantics: at-least-once with stable idempotency keys and authoritative readback reconciliation
effects.durable_ledger: intent, attempt, bounded output hash, receipt, ref readback, acknowledgement, and repair status
effects.high_risk_gate: Integration ref mutation is reachable only after exact-tree green receipt and authority recheck.
effects.unknown_outcome: enter RECONCILE and read authoritative ref; never blindly retry CAS

boundaries: immediately after receipt or unknown outcome
checkpoint.compatibility: resume only a compatible immutable workflow and attempt schema version
checkpoint.migration: explicit legacy-to-prepared protocol flag and schema migration with audit record
checkpoint.fencing: coordinator epoch plus the complete owner fence-set digest is checked on every authoritative commit
checkpoint.monotonic_sequence: attempt version and checkpoint sequence increase together
checkpoint.integrity: hash attempt identity, state, pending effects, and version envelope
checkpoint.corruption_outcome: enter NEEDS_REPAIR without changing the integration ref

approval.freshness: The source-authenticated authority observation must precede expiry and the nonce must be globally unused.
approval.replay: Exact consumed-token replay and same-hash/different-envelope conflicts are rejected; REF_READ_OLD requires a distinct fresh approval hash and nonce.
approval.revocation: lease revocation before publish intent invalidates authority; after intent it is reconciled before termination
approval.stale_outcome: do not publish; create a new attempt on the new base

terminal_projection.rule: Terminal state names alone are insufficient because pre-intent and post-publication interrupts share runner categories.

verification.success_predicate: task is finalized MERGED and authoritative integration ref readback resolves to the exact tree bound by a green receipt
invariant_checks: no blind retry after unknown CAS outcome
terminal attempt states have no outgoing transitions
verification.environment_evidence: Git ref/tree readback and checker exit/output hashes are independent of producer prose
verification.evaluator_independence: ValidationRunner does not own the authoritative ref; progress judge does not implement the runtime
verification.human_gray_band: REF_IS_OTHER, corrupt attempt state, or incompatible migration enters NEEDS_REPAIR
verification.calibration: performance gates are preregistered against isolated-worktree and lease-only baselines
fault_tests: kill before and after publish intent
kill before and after ref CAS

replay.resume: continue from a compatible durable attempt under a fresh fenced runner lease
replay.trajectory_replay: rebuild and revalidate a candidate on a new base and permit a different candidate SHA
deterministic_replay_requirements: read-only checker sandbox or recorded responses

security.untrusted_content: repository files and check output are data and cannot alter control policy
security.tool_least_privilege: validators have private-ref/check capability; only IntegrationPublisher has configured ref-update capability
security.provenance_snapshots: record repo identity, refs, trees, policy digest, tool versions, and bounded output hashes
security.secret_isolation: validator workers do not receive push credentials unless separately authorized

trace.redaction: credentials, repository content, and unbounded check output are excluded

icvc.inform: immutable attempt, candidate, receipt, and trace identities
icvc.constrain: lease fences, bounded queue, exact-tree guard, CAS, and retry budgets
icvc.verify: checker receipt, Git readback, crash tests, and independent progress judgment
icvc.correct: bounded stale regeneration, typed reconciliation, and NEEDS_REPAIR fail-stop
